text.title: Regression Test First Bugfix Workflow Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is the bug deterministically reproducible from a fixed input?

branch.question: Does the SLA / customer pressure allow time for red-test-first?

branch.conclusion: Full flow: write the red test FIRST, then the fix, ship both in one PR. Use procedure steps 1-6.
Hotfix-then-test variant: ship the smallest possible fix immediately; open a follow-up ticket to land the pinned regression test within one cycle. Record the follow-up id in the workflow record.
Skip this methodology. Route to observability/QA: add structured logging + a synthetic monitor that fails on the symptom; do not pretend to add a regression test.

example.p: Sentry alert reproduces with `amount=0.0, locale=tr_TR`. SLA: 24h, plenty of room → full red-test-first flow → conclusion r1.
